commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=788c94493692d673015611932f26b6e753290a5c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the history refresh before normal displayable chat final handling and updates TUI event-handler tests to expect no reload.

Reproducibility: no. not with high-confidence live proof. Source inspection shows the current final branch can call `loadHistory` before finalizing displayable output and that `loadHistory` clears the chat log, so the race is plausible but not reproduced in a real TUI session here.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because the branch has a narrow code defect and missing real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's real TUI evidence.

target.title: fix(tui): avoid stale history refresh after final response
target.author: nao860226-rgb

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
